summary.zh: 在内容加载期间用低对比扫光表达进行中状态。
summary.en: Communicate loading progress with a low-contrast shimmer across placeholders.

definition.zh: 内容加载期间显示的占位结构，表面带有移动的微光。
definition.en: A placeholder layout uses a moving highlight to communicate that content is still loading.

description.zh: 控制完整循环的节奏；持续动态需要支持暂停并保持低干扰。
description.en: Controls the rhythm of one full cycle; continuous motion should stay pausable and low-distraction.

purpose.zh: 在内容加载期间维持布局，并用低对比扫光表达仍在进行。
purpose.en: Preserve layout during loading and communicate ongoing work through a low-contrast shimmer.

frequency.zh: 只在预期等待超过短暂阈值时显示；快速请求直接呈现结果。
frequency.en: Show only when expected waiting exceeds a brief threshold, rendering fast results directly.

trigger.zh: 由加载延迟阈值触发，真实内容就绪后立即停止。
trigger.en: Trigger after a loading-delay threshold and stop as soon as real content is ready.

enterExit.zh: 骨架静态占位先出现，扫光低速循环；内容进入采用短交叉淡化。
enterExit.en: Show static placeholders first, loop a slow shimmer, and crossfade briefly into real content.

interruptibility.zh: 请求取消或重试时更新状态，禁止叠加多个扫光计时器。
interruptibility.en: Update state on cancel or retry without stacking shimmer timers.

gestureRules.zh: 骨架不接收操作；加载期间保留可用的取消、返回或重试控件。
gestureRules.en: Skeletons are noninteractive while cancel, back, or retry controls remain available.

reducedMotion.zh: 关闭扫光，保留静态骨架和明确的加载文本。
reducedMotion.en: Disable shimmer and keep a static skeleton with explicit loading text.

reviewNotes.zh: 骨架尺寸应接近真实内容，避免加载完成后布局跳动。
reviewNotes.en: Match skeleton dimensions to real content to prevent completion shifts.

reviewNotes.zh: 页面隐藏和离屏时暂停扫光。
reviewNotes.en: Pause shimmer when hidden or offscreen.
